use_cases: Displaying confirmation dialogs for user actions
Showing form content or data entry modals
Presenting alerts and notifications in an overlay
Revealing detailed information in a contained view
Capturing user input through modal-based forms
ai_summary: A modal dialog component built with Radix UI primitives and styled with Tailwind CSS. Features configurable button variants using CVA for different styles and states. Includes Lucide icons for close and confirm actions, providing a clean, accessible overlay for confirmations, alerts, and content display.
